title: OpenAI and Work Louder launch Codex Micro control pad
friendlyTitle: OpenAI launches a small keyboard for Codex AI work
summary: OpenAI and Work Louder have released the $230 Codex Micro, a compact programmable keyboard for ChatGPT Codex. Its dedicated controls and RGB status lights are designed to surface agent state and launch common coding workflows such as review, debugging and refactoring.
friendlySummary: OpenAI and Work Louder made a $230 mini keyboard for ChatGPT Codex. It has buttons for common coding tasks and lights that show what AI agents are doing.
whyItMatters: It is an early example of AI-agent work moving beyond the browser into dedicated physical controls. The value will depend on whether visible status and shortcuts reduce context switching rather than merely adding desk hardware.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It may help people keep track of AI coding tasks without always switching between windows.
